parameters.query: SELECT id, telegram_id, first_name, age, gender, weight_kg, height_cm, activity_level, goal, daily_calorie_target FROM users WHERE id=$1
SELECT sleep_hours, energy_level, mood, food_description, calories_consumed, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, workout_description, steps, water_ml, log_date FROM daily_logs WHERE user_id=$1 AND log_date=$2
SELECT log_date, calories_consumed, sleep_hours, energy_level, workout_done, steps FROM daily_logs WHERE user_id=$1 ORDER BY log_date DESC LIMIT 7

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama3', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 1500, stream: false } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO ai_recommendations (user_id, recommendation_date, full_response, model_used) VALUES ($1, CURRENT_DATE, $2, 'llama3') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
